title: Russian Apricot Pirozhki Filling
description: A sweet and tangy filling inspired by russian cuisine, perfect for pirozhki. This recipe combines the flavors of apricot and fermented ingredients, topped with crispy notes.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine apricot jam, fermented cabbage, crispy fried onions, flour, sugar, cinnamon, and salt. Mix well.
Add the beaten egg and milk to the bowl. Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball and then flatten it slightly.
Place the flattened dough onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the pirozhki in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Allow the pirozhki to cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes before serving.
